/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libworkload_nodes__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libworkload_nodes__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/workload_nodes__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/workload_nodes/msg/detail/workload_msg__description.c.o CMakeFiles/workload_nodes__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/workload_nodes/msg/detail/workload_msg__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/workload_nodes__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/workload_nodes/msg/detail/workload_msg__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
